nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist'.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Add explicit null check for Integer parameter to prevent NullPointerException during unboxing in JDK 21.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: Without this change, passing a null Integer to the method causes a NullPointerException when the code attempts to unbox it to int for comparison (musicType.getType() == type), which is a runtime failure.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate servlet and validation imports from javax.* to jakarta.* to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet and javax.validation do not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+), causing class not found errors.
